title: Redux Toolkit
body:
## Definition

**Redux Toolkit (RTK)** is the official Redux approach with `createSlice`, Immer-powered reducers, built-in thunk, and simplified store setup.

## Why it exists

Reduce Redux boilerplate, enforce best practices, and provide batteries-included async patterns.

## How it works

```js
const counterSlice = createSlice({
  name: "counter",
  initialState: { value: 0 },
  reducers: { increment: state => { state.value += 1; } },
});
```

Includes RTK Query for server cache in many apps.

## Common confusion

Still global store complexity — [Zustand](concept:zustand) or [TanStack Query](concept:tanstack-query) may fit simpler needs.

## In practice

Large apps with predictable global state; pair server cache with RTK Query or TanStack Query deliberately.

## Definition

**[Redux Toolkit](concept:redux-toolkit) ([RTK](concept:redux-toolkit))** is the official Redux approach with [createSlice](concept:redux-toolkit), Immer-powered reducers, built-in thunk, and simplified store setup.

## Why it exists

[Reduce](concept:array-map-filter-reduce) Redux boilerplate, enforce best practices, and provide batteries-included [async](concept:async-await) patterns.

## How it works

```js
const counterSlice = createSlice({
  name: "counter",
  initialState: { value: 0 },
  reducers: { increment: state => { state.value += 1; } },
});
```

Includes [RTK](concept:redux-toolkit) Query for server cache in many apps.

## Common confusion

Still global store complexity — [Zustand](concept:zustand) or [TanStack Query](concept:tanstack-query) may fit simpler needs.

## In practice

Large apps with predictable [global state](concept:react-context-api); pair server cache with [RTK](concept:redux-toolkit) Query or [TanStack Query](concept:tanstack-query) deliberately.
